$description: Machine-checkable guardrails for a build plan. The tests/ harness runs these against every plan; each rule references artifacts that define what 'exists'.

rules.description: Every section.recipe must name a recipe that exists in recipes/.
plan.theme must exist in tokens/manifest.json themes.available.
For each section, every required content field of its recipe must be present.
Exactly one section may contribute the page h1 (the hero).
A page opens with header (banner) and closes with footer (contentinfo).
Content must not carry design values (hex colors, px/rem sizes, style props).
rules.check: no content string matches /#[0-9a-f]{3,8}|\d+(px|rem|em)\b/ and no key ∈ styleVocabulary

rules.description: CTA labels should be specific, not generic.
